title: FarmXP
description: Reward players with XP for harvesting fully grown crops and sugar cane.
body:
FarmXP is a lightweight Paper plugin that rewards players with experience orbs when they harvest fully grown crops and sugar cane. It makes farming more rewarding while keeping the setup simple and server-friendly.

Server owners can choose exactly which crops should give XP through the config file, adjust the XP reward in-game with /farmxp <amount>, and enable or disable the plugin at any time with commands.

FarmXP also supports optional LuckPerms integration. If LuckPerms is installed, only players or groups with the farmxp.use permission will receive farming XP. Without LuckPerms, the plugin works normally for all players.

The plugin is designed to be easy to configure, lightweight, and suitable for survival servers that want farming to feel more useful without adding unnecessary complexity.

Commands:
- /farmxp status - Shows whether FarmXP is enabled, the XP reward, LuckPerms mode, and enabled crops.
- /farmxp crops - Shows the crops currently enabled in the config.
- /farmxp <amount> - Sets how much XP is dropped per valid harvest.
- /farmxp enable - Enables FarmXP rewards.
- /farmxp disable - Disables FarmXP rewards.
- /farmxp reload - Reloads the config file.

Permissions:
- farmxp.use - Allows a player to receive farming XP when LuckPerms is installed.
- farmxp.admin - Gives access to every FarmXP command and includes farmxp.use.
- farmxp.command.status - Allows checking FarmXP status and enabled crops.
- farmxp.command.toggle - Allows enabling and disabling FarmXP rewards.
- farmxp.command.reload - Allows reloading the config.
- farmxp.command.setreward - Allows changing the XP reward amount.
